summary: Iteration 11 NEW FEATURES testing COMPLETE. All new features verified: TAP tab numbers (#101+), 7 menu categories, custom item form, $ currency. Manager Dashboard with 4 sidebar tabs (Menu/Staff/Settings/Reports). Owner Dashboard with 5 sidebar tabs and metric cards. Back buttons navigate to /venue/home. CEO hidden from modules dropdown. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified via Playwright.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <option>/<select> - cosmetic only, not blocking functionality

critical_code_review_comments: TablePage.js line 326: React hydration warning for <span> inside <option>. This is a minor issue likely caused by dev tooling wrapper, not blocking functionality
